caption: A woman with curly blonde hair tied back, wearing a black t-shirt and over-ear headphones, is seated in a podcast studio. She faces left, looking toward someone off-screen with a slight smile. In front of her is a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe and a television screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text. A smaller sign above the screen reads "Employees Only." On the lower left of the screen, a logo for a "PODCAST" is visible, and to the right, red text reads "BOSS TALK 101" with smaller text underneath that says "By 11 logo Studio." Across the sequence, the woman remains in a nearly static position, maintaining her gaze and expression with only minimal shifts in her posture.
